# OpenSlop

> OpenSlop is a free, open-source AI video creation pipeline that turns a single prompt into a finished video. It's fully modular and orchestrates all your favorite tools such as Claude, Runware, Kling, Cartesia, ElevenLabs, and ffmpeg into one automated workflow - no manual editing, no GPU required.

OpenSlop is built for YouTube creators who want to produce AI-generated videos at scale without paying for expensive all-in-one tools that produce generic output. The pipeline handles scripting, image generation, selective animation, TTS voiceover, music, and final assembly.

## Blog

- [Why Every AI Video Tool Feels Broken](https://openslop.com/blog/why-every-ai-video-tool-feels-broken): Analysis of why current AI video tools fall short — quality caps, consistency failures, and the gap between marketing promises and actual output.
- [The No-BS Guide to AI Video Creation at Scale](https://openslop.com/blog/the-no-bs-guide-to-ai-video-creation-at-scale): Complete guide covering the $2/video pipeline, tool stack, multi-pass scripting, character consistency, YouTube growth strategy, and monetization.
- [Narrative Diffusion: The Multi-Pass Scripting Method](https://openslop.com/blog/narrative-diffusion-the-multi-pass-scripting-method): Deep dive into the 5-pass scripting method that makes AI scripts sound human, with exact prompts, model rankings, and pro tips.

## Pages

- [Home](https://openslop.com): Landing page with product overview and beta waitlist signup.
- [About](https://openslop.com/about): About the OpenSlop team and mission.
